profile_text: Hi! I'm Layla Al-Mahmoud, recently joined M42 as a Senior Clinical Data Scientist about 3 months ago — I came from a public health background and spent 6 years at the WHO Geneva office before relocating to Abu Dhabi. I'm based in our HQ here and currently working on the predictive analytics pipeline for the cardiology programme. Really interested in clinical decision support, federated learning, and explainable AI for healthcare. Long-term I'd love to bridge clinical and AI work more deeply. Honestly, settling in has been harder than I expected — I'm still trying to find my footing socially in the office. Most of my old work circle is in Europe and the timezone gap makes it hard to stay close. Looking to meet people working on similar problems, ideally someone more experienced in regional healthcare regulation since I'm new to the GCC context. I speak English, French, and Arabic.
